episodes.title: EXPOSING the Jehovah’s Witness CULT
episodes.description:
I was abused by this cult. I know I am not the only one. Other people have spoken up. It took some time for me to even find the words. This is the Jehovah’s Witness Doomsday Cult.
They take your childhood away. You are abused repeatedly. It is all a secret; until you decide enough is enough.
Then you scream.
#exjehovahswitnesses #exjwsthink #exjw #exjehovahswitnesses #churchlife
